---
name: Pattern candidate
about: Propose a new named pattern under Precomputed AI.
title: "[pattern-candidate] "
labels: pattern-candidate
---

A pattern earns a name when it has a shipped worked example *and* meets all three required properties (versioned artifact, regeneration cadence, declared coverage path). Open this issue first; once a worked example exists, a PR to `patterns/` is welcome.

## Proposed name

A short, sticky name. The existing patterns are nouns/noun-phrases (e.g. "Ruleset Compilation").

## Problem

What recurring problem does this pattern solve that existing patterns don't?

## Mechanism

How does it work? What is the artifact, and how is it produced and served?

## How it differs from existing patterns

Be specific about the boundary with Ruleset Compilation, Constraint Baking, and Scheduled Generation. If it's a composition of existing patterns, say so.

## Worked example

Link to a shipped tool, or describe the example you intend to ship. Pattern PRs without a worked example will be redirected back to this issue.

## Required properties

How does the proposed pattern satisfy each:

- Versioned artifact —
- Regeneration cadence —
- Declared coverage path —
